examples: He is always suntanned and incredibly fit.
As they approached the shore, a lanky, suntanned, salt-encrusted 26-year-old stepped out with a splash and clambered up onto a jumble of broken basalt.
The suntanned IMF chief wore a black trench coat and an open-necked pale shirt, in contrast to the jeans and sweatshirts of the others waiting to be brought before the judge.
